The frame shows a dark-themed chat interface with text messages in white and pink. A central modal displaying pink text describes a "wobbly woven shapes" rendering process, set against a dark background.

A dark-themed chat interface shows white and pink text messages with individual user icons. A small, translucent pink modal box appears in the center, containing white text that describes a rendering process.

The frame features a user interface with a central image showing an irregular, tessellated composition of various polygons in colors such as green, purple, blue, tan, brown, and pink.
